ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "display_name" TEXT /* Full display name of the player */,
  "short_display_name" TEXT /* Short display name of the player */,
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the squad the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player on the field */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "player_image" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_squad_id FOREIGN KEY ("squad_id") REFERENCES squads ("squad_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squads" (
  "squad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squad */,
  "squad_name" TEXT /* Name of the squad */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach for the squad */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager for the squad */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team to which the squad belongs */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league in which the team participates */,
  "squad_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the squad */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squads_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match took place */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Home Win, Away Win, Draw) */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, cup, friendly) */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance figure for the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the player participated in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player participating in the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "participation_status" TEXT /* Status of the player's participation (e.g., started, substituted, injured) */,
  "substitution_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the player was substituted in or out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_participation_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_participation_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being tracked */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* Serialized data for the player at the given version date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_versions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
